tracking.notes: Fixtura requests non-personalized ads only and does not show the App Tracking Transparency prompt.

appStoreConnect.dataCollection: Yes, we collect data from this app

dataTypes.source: Anonymous backend session ID created on first launch.
Gameplay funnel events such as team selection, predictions, and tournament progress.
Optional tournament progress sync to api.fixtura.xyz. Local SQLite remains authoritative.
Session duration, app version, platform, and language in analytics events.
Google Mobile Ads SDK may collect device identifiers for ad delivery. Declare via Google's data disclosure in App Store Connect.
Google Mobile Ads SDK for banner and interstitial ads.

admobConsole.privacyMessaging: Configure GDPR/EEA consent messaging in AdMob Privacy & messaging before release.
admobConsole.childDirected: Set if the app targets children. Fixtura is a general football simulation game.

androidDataSafety.notes: Mirror the iOS declarations for analytics, optional backend sync, and Google Mobile Ads.
